overall.description: Static shot of a gothic dining hall from a video game, featuring students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables under vaulted stone ceilings with iron chandeliers. The scene has a cool, dimly lit atmosphere typical of a medieval castle interior.

group of students seated at the far table, engaged in conversation

entered.detail: high arched stone ceiling with ribbed vaulting and dark wooden beams
ornate hanging chandeliers with multiple candle-style lights suspended from the ceiling
long dark wooden tables with matching benches arranged in rows
dark stone walls with wooden paneling and trim
rectangular framed artworks or tapestries hanging on the stone walls
elaborate stone or marble sculptural structure with intricate carvings
gothic arched doorway leading to another part of the building

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic dining hall with high vaulted ceilings and iron chandeliers. Several students in dark robes sit at long wooden tables, while stone walls with framed tapestries line the right side. The scene is dimly lit with a cool blue atmosphere, and an ornate sculptural structure is visible in the right foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze across a gothic dining hall steeped in a cool, dimly lit ambiance. It begins with a wide view of the high vaulted ceilings and heavy iron chandeliers that cast a soft glow over the space. As the eye settles, the scene reveals students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables, framed by stone walls adorned with ancient tapestries. The perspective remains fixed, allowing the cool blue light to emphasize the stillness of the hall before lingering on an ornate sculptural structure positioned in the right foreground.
